## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to align on ongoing projects, discuss content strategy, and review LLM monitoring for Diligent.](https://fathom.video/share/Hs9zq7YhxkphsSsrb3yi51ax26Tr-7M7?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content refresh project progressing well; 5 refreshes in progress, due for review by John](https://fathom.video/share/Hs9zq7YhxkphsSsrb3yi51ax26Tr-7M7?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [Diligent showing strong presence and positive sentiment in LLM monitoring (Scrunch tool)](https://fathom.video/share/Hs9zq7YhxkphsSsrb3yi51ax26Tr-7M7?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
  - [Team to develop structured reporting for LLM data, focusing on business units and buyer journey stages](https://fathom.video/share/Hs9zq7YhxkphsSsrb3yi51ax26Tr-7M7?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Navigation refresh in progress; GrowthX team to provide SEO perspective](https://fathom.video/share/Hs9zq7YhxkphsSsrb3yi51ax26Tr-7M7?tab=summary&timestamp=1784.0)
